reach_why: Mostly extends existing critiques of scale, mediation, and evaluator drift; opaque axioms add little explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links architecture-vs-scale rhetoric, mediated novelty, and self-evaluation instability into one skeptical frame.
falsifiable_why: Parts are testable, but opaque axioms and broad interpretive claims weaken clear empirical disconfirmation.
explanation: It warns that apparent architectural intelligence may mask redistributed scale, representational artifacts, and unstable self-improvement.
